SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.abstraction

Interface Constructor

All Superinterfaces:
ClassTypeContainer, Member, Method, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConstructorDeclaration, DefaultConstructor
public interface Constructor extends Method
A program model element representing constructors. Constructors are modelled as subtypes of methods and will return the enclosing type as return type.
